series_metadata.series_description: This report contains data from each school district that has been furnished with a Multi-Media System funded by the National Highway Safety Administration for use in Driver Education classes. This teaching aide is a student response system with Multi-Media Controls which make possible the use of automatically programmed audio and/or visual presentations in addition to provideing the instruction, the means to monitor student comprehension during the instruction process.
